channel.title: Research on Ahsan
channel.description: Recent content in Research on Ahsan

item.title: 50 Journals used in the FT Research Rank
item.description:
The FT50 list is a compilation of 50 prestigious academic and practitioner journals used by the Financial Times to calculate the Research Rank for various MBA and business school rankings. Journals are chosen based on their perceived quality, impact, and relevance to the business school community.

The list originally contained 45 journals. In 2016, the Financial Times expanded the list to 50 following a comprehensive review and consultation with business schools worldwide.
